settings.html:
Limited Offer at Velocity 2026

Charter Member Rate

The first 100 new Five Star Alliance members who join at Velocity receive:

$300 per year, locked for the life of membership

Plus 20% off all FSI events permanently.

Once 100 spots are filled, the standard Alliance rate of $495 per year applies. Charter Members receive a permanent Charter Member designation in the FSI RE community directory. Charter Member enrollment is available as an add-on during Velocity registration.

Register for Velocity 2026
